summary: Comprehensive testing of Intercultura Asistente Virtual - language school web app. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing completed with all major features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows '3 Idiomas' instead of '4 Idiomas' despite code showing '4'. Possible Expo caching issue.

issues: Favicon link not detected in HTML head during Playwright test, but /favicon.png is accessible (200 OK). This is likely an Expo web dev mode limitation where +html.tsx head elements may not render consistently.

action_items: MINOR: Verify profile page '4 Idiomas' stat displays correctly after Expo rebuild/cache clear
MINOR: Verify favicon displays in production build (works in dev but link tag detection inconsistent)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor display issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Welcome page with Intercultura branding (no Emergent/Polyglot references), student/teacher login, dashboard with 4 languages, courses tab with 30 courses (4 langs x 6 levels + French), flashcards tab with language/level selection, quizzes tab with 30 quizzes, AI exercises tab with generation options, profile page with logout, teacher dashboard with student management. TTS API works for all 4 languages. Backend has 27 passing tests covering auth, courses, lessons, flashcards, quizzes, TTS, progress, and teacher endpoints.

welcome_page.details: Intercultura logo and branding visible, no Emergent/Polyglot references, login/register buttons work

login_flow.details: Student login (testuser123@test.com) and teacher login (profesor@test.com) both work correctly

dashboard.details: Shows 4 languages (Español, English, Português, Deutsch) with flags, progress stats, quick actions

courses_tab.details: Shows 30 courses with language/level filters, each course has 6 lessons

flashcards_tab.details: Language/level selection, shows flashcard count, preview cards visible

quizzes_tab.details: Shows 30 quizzes with filters, each quiz has 10 questions

ai_exercises_tab.details: Exercise type selection (Gramática, Vocabulario, Lectura, Escritura), generate button works

profile_page.details: Shows user info, role badge, logout button works. Minor issue: shows 3 Idiomas instead of 4

teacher_dashboard.details: Profesor tab visible for teachers, shows 7 students, 30 courses, 9 quizzes, 66.7% average

tts_api.details: POST /api/tts/generate works for Spanish, English, Portuguese, German

favicon.details: /favicon.png accessible (200 OK), but link tag not detected in Playwright. Likely Expo dev mode limitation
